file_categories.harness-owned static: Copied and drift-checked by content hash.
file_categories.project-owned state: Copied or reset during initialization, then validated semantically instead of byte-compared.
file_categories.merge-sensitive: Never overwritten by default because the target project may already own this file.
file_categories.optional integration: Copied when missing and reported when changed, but not required for core harness validity.
file_categories.template manifest: Template metadata used for future drift checks.

layouts.hidden: Default for installed projects. Root keeps thin AGENTS.md and init.sh entrypoints; the harness body lives under .agent-harness/.
layouts.visible: Harness development layout. Harness files are copied at repository root for direct inspection and template maintenance.

version_drift.check: Report installed_version, template_version, drift files, state validity, and next_action.
version_drift.repair: Restore missing files and write an installation manifest without overwriting local modifications.
version_drift.upgrade: Future explicit mode for template-version upgrades after review.
